THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MINORITY TELEVISION PROJECT, INC., DBA KMTP-TV CHANNEL 32 $14,038.43 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,715.52 INTEREST, $1,029.35 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,443.30, DEFT PAY PLTF FURTHER INTEREST ON ABOVE AMOUNTS UNPAID AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM FROM DATE OF JUDGMENT UP TO DATE OF FULL PAYMENT. COURT REAFFIRMS THE MONETARY SANCTIONS GRAN TED AGAINST BOTH DEFT & IT'S ATTORNEY, TIMOTHY MOPPIN IN THE SUM OF $523.00 TO BE PD TO PLTF & DEEMED ADDITIONAL JUDGMENT
